title: SERCHHIP-AH DISTRICT LEVEL COMMITTEE ON NASHA MUKT BHARAT ABHIYAN THUKHAWM
content:
1094/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 19thJune 2026:Vawiin khan District Level Committee on Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyan Committee chu an Chairman, District Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma hovin a pisa-ah an thu khawm a. June ni 17 atanga ni 26, (International Day Against Drug Abuse & Illicit Trafficking) thleng awh tur Nasha Mukt Saptah (Drug-Free Week) chungchang leh Serchhip-a he hun hman dan tur chungchangte sawi ho a ni.

Chairman, Serchhip District Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan Ruihhlo do kawngah sawrkar leh mipuite tanrual a ngaih takzet thu sawiin, he hapta hman mekah pawh hian mipuite'n ruihhlo that lohzia leh ram leh hnam hmelma a nih dante hre thar leh a, uar lehzuala ruihhlo laka kan fihlim theih nan, mahni hmazawn theuha theihtawp chhuahpuiah Serchhip mipuite a sawm a ni.

Meeting-ah hian Sub-Deputy Commissioner Pi Lalchhanhimi hnen atangin he hapta hman chhunga sawrkar department hrang hrangte leh mipuite'n kan tih ve tur chanvote (action plan) ngaihthlak a ni a. Mipuite'n ruihhlo laka fihlim tura intiamna - online mass pledge te, signature campaign te, media kaltlang awareness programme te, ruihhlo ngaite tan health camp te, yoga-meditation te, walkathon/a huhova kawngzawh leh two-wheeler rally te bakah, College zirlaite tan slogan-writing competition te he Drug-Free Week/Nasha Mukt Saptah chhung hian neih tura ruahman a ni.

title: Lunglei Ramtharah 40 Days Healthy Lunglei Intensive Campaign hnuaiah hriselna chungchang inzirtirna leh hriselna dinhmun endikna buatsaih a ni
content:
1093/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 19:Nizan khan BCM Ramthar, Lunglei Kohhran Hall-ah Ṭhalai Kristian Pawl (ṬKP) Ramthar Unit-a Group pathum – Marka, Luka leh Johana Group te nen 40 Days Healthy Lunglei Intensive Campaign hun hman niin, hriselna chungchang leh LushAI Healthy Lunglei App chungchang inzirtir a nih bakah, a thlawnin kal khawmte hriselna dinhmun endiksak an ni.

District Administration ai awhin Pi L. Lalremruati'n hun kaihruaiin, Healthy Lunglei Campaign buatsaih chhan a sawi fiah a. Health ATM chungchang leh a ṭangkai dan leh hman dan te sawiin, Lunglei District chu Mizorama Health ATM nei hmasa ber a nih thu a sawi a. Kal khawmte chu Civil Hospital Lungleia Health ATM-ah an hriselna dinhmun te enfiahtir ve ngei turin a sawm a. LushAI Healthy Lunglei App chungchang leh a ṭangkaina te a sawi zau bawk.

Health Department aṭangin Chanmari Health & Wellness Centre-a Health & Wellness Officer Pi Lalawmpuii Fanai chuan hriselna ngaih pawimawh a ṭulzia sawiin, natna inkai chhawn theih loh (non-communicable disease: NCD) laka inven dan leh hriselna atana tih tur leh tih loh tur hrang hrangte a zirtir.

He hunah hian ṬKP member mi 70 chuang an kal khawm a. Medical Team te'n health screening buatsaih chhunzawmin, kal khawmte hriselna dinhmun endik a ni a. Kal khawmte chu LushAI Healthy Lunglei App hman dan a taka zirtir niin, App hi download-tir vek an ni bawk.

LushAI Healthy Lunglei app hmang hian district chhunga sawrkar damdawi in leh health centre-a daktawrte ṭhut hun tur a en theih bakah, OPD-a inentir turin appointment a lak lawk (book) theih a. ABHA-a inziah luhna te, he app-a inziak lut damdawi dawr (pharmacy)-te aṭanga damdawi chah theihna te awmin, hriselna lama hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrangte pawh awlsam takin a hmuh theih a. OPD appointment laknaa pui thei tur leh zawhna hrang hrang Mizo ṭawnga chhang thei tur AI chatbot dah tel a ni bawk a. Android hmangte tanplay.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.lushaihealthylunglei.androidaṭangin leh iOS hmangte tanapps.apple.com/in/app/lhl/id6755673586aṭangin download theih a  ni.

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN SHILLONG-A DAMLO THLENNA IN SAK MEK A TLAWH
content:
1092/2026-2027

Aizawl the 19th June 2026: Ministry of Finance buatsaih Seminar hmanga Shillong-a cham mek Pu Lalduhoma chuan vawiin khan, Mawdiangdiang, Shillong, NEIGRIHMS hospital bula Mizoram sorkarin damlo, he Hospital pantute thlenna tura a buatsaih Patient Lodge sak mek a tlawh a. Luah theiha buatsaih zui dan tur a en.

He Lodge Approved cost hi Rs 4.19 crore niin NEC Fund atanga thawh a ni a. NEC hian fund zawng zawng an release tawh a, project hi 100% complete thuak tawh niin khum 60 awm tura ruahman a ni.

Chief Minister ho hian NEC project in ken tel loh mamawh dang la awm; a hungna te, a kawt pavement te, furniture leina turte sawi ho a ni a. NEIGHRIMS Hospital a boralte han chawlpuina tur leh thlahliamna tur an mamawh thu Shillong Mizo Welfare pawhin an lo thlen bawk. Tin, he hmuna thawktute chenna tur pawh sak a tul nia ngaih a ni a. Heng mamawh te hi PWD in estimate leh proposal siamin Planning Department ah thehlut se, an ti. Tui supply atan Meghalaya sawrkar hian tui drill phalna pawh min pe tawh a, hma lak mek a ni.

Chief Minister hi Pu NG Yirmayai, IES, Director (Health Sector), NEC te, Mizoram sorkar Planning Department leh PWD Official ten an tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: Champhaiah District Consultative Committee, District Review Committee leh District Level Security Committee thukhawm
content:
1091/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 19th June 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Champhaiah January atanga March thla chhunga district chhunga bank hrang hrang hnathawh thlirlet turin District Consultative Committee, District Review Committee leh District Level Security Committee an thukhawm a, Champhai Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan a kaihruai.

He hunah hian Chairman Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan Annual Credit Plan, Champhai District,  2026-27 chu a tlangzarh a, hemi zawh hian SBI Lead District Manager Pu Lawmkima'n chuan Champhai District-a bank atanga sector hrang hranga loan pek an tum zat (target) a sawi a, heng target hi pha ngei turin an infuih bawk. Hemi zawh hian committee chuan agenda an sawi chhunzawm nghal a, invenhimna (security) kawnga an ruahmanna leh inpuahchahna te an sawi a, Champhai Police-in meeting awm leh hmain surprise check nei tawh se tih an rel a ni. Pawisa an kawl dan leh pek chhuah theih dan (cash/currency management leh remittance issues) chungchang an sawi chhunzawm a, Credit Deposit (CD) Ratio chungchang sawiin Champhai bank te loan pek chhuah zat a tam tawk lo a, tan lak theihnaah tan la turin an infuih bawk a ni.

He hunah RBI leh NABARD atang leh Champhai District hnuaia bank hrang hrang manager bakah line department hrang hrang hotu/aiawh an tel tha hle a ni.

Attachment

title: Tlabungah YMA Section fai inelna lawmman sem a ni
content:
1090/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 19:Vawiin khan BDO Conference Hall, Tlabungah Tlabung Sub-Divisional Officer (Sadar)/Block Development Officer Pu Moses Lalfakawma Tlau kaihhruaina hnuaia din Clean Keeping & Progressive Tlabung Committee (CK&PTC)-in June ni 12, 2016-a a buatsaih Tlabung khaw chhunga "YMA Section Fai Ber Inelna" lawmman semna hun hman a ni a. Tlabung khaw chhunga Sawrkar Office hotute, Village Council (VC) leh tlawmngai pawl (NGO) hruaitute leh kohhran hrang hrang puipate nen Tlabung khaw chhung faina kawnga hmasawn zel dan tur sawi ho nghal a ni.

Tlabung SDO(C) Pu Moses Lalfakawma Tlau chuan faina kawnga Tlabung khua leh a chhehvelte hmasawnna hmuh theiha a awm chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Hmasawn zel turin Tlabung mipuite'n theihna an neih thu sawiin, faina kawnga theih tawp chhuah zel turin mipuite a chah.

He hunah hian endiktute leh pawl hrang hrang ai awhte'n thu an sawi a. Tlabung Branch YMA Cultural Club Committee te'n hnam lam hmuhnawm tak an entir bawk.

Clean Keeping & Progressive Tlabung Committee (CK&PTC)-in a buatsaih Tlabunga "YMA Section Fai Ber Inelna"-ah hian endiktu tura ruatte endikna aṭangin he'ngte hi lawmman dawngte an ni:

1.Pakhatna: Saizahawla Section, Zodin Branch

2.Pahnihna: Zampuimanga Section, Zodin Branch

3.Pathumna: Taitesena Section, Tlabung Branch

Consolation Prize:

(1) Taitesena Section, Chawnpui Branch

(2) Vanapa Section, Chawnpui Branch

title: Telecom Advisory Committee (TAC) meeting neih a ni
content:
1089/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 19 June, 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram Lok Sabha MP leh TAC Chairman ni bawk Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha kaihhruaiin Telecom Advisory Committee (TAC) chu CWW Conference Hall, MINECO-ah an thukhawm a. Thutkhawmah hian TAC member-te bakah Mizorama BSNL Business Area (BA) aiawh officers-te an tel a ni.

Meeting-ah hian Mizoram Lok Sabha MP Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha chuan BSNL hotute chu Mizorama khaw awm zawng zawng thleng pha tura an huang tizau leh an thlen chinte network tha taka thuam turin a chah a. A bik takin Sawrkar laipui hmalakna PM Poshan, VB-G RAM G, NREGA, etc.-te changtlung zawka kalpui a nih theih nana geo-tagging tihchak kawnga Mizoramin hma a sawn theih nana tan la lehzual tura fuihin, project pawimawh tak tak an kalpui mek DBN 4G Saturation Project-te, BOP-BIP Project-te, Indo-Myanmar Project leh a dang tam takte chu theihtawp chhuaha bawhzui zel turin a chah bawk a ni.

Meeting-ah hian Pu B.P. Meena, General Manager, BSNL Mizoram BA chuan Mizoram chhunga Telecom hmalakna tlangpuite sawizauvin, Telecom hmalakna Phase-IX hnuaiah, Mizorama hmun 111 ah leh 4G Saturation Project hnuaia hmun 30 ahte 4G network bun a ni tih a sawi a.

Pu B.P. Meena chuan kalkhawmte hnenah hian Sawrkar laipui chuan BharatNet Programme (ABP) hnuaiah thingtlang lama digital connectivity tih chakhna turin chak takin hma a la mek tih a hrilh a. He programme hnuaiah hian Mizorama Gram Panchayats 776 (GPs) te chu optical fibre network hmanga thlunzawm vek an ni dawn tih sawiin, heng OFC-te hi KM 5,600 KM lai awh tura rin a ni tih thukhawmte hi a hrilh bawk.

Meeting-ah hian BSNL hotute chuan tun hnaiah Saitual, Khawzawl leh Champhai district headquarters-ahte Optical Fibre Cable (OFC) connectivity tihzauh belh a ni tih tarlangin, telecom leh broadband service-te thuam that nan Serchhip, Lunglei, Lawngtlai leh Siaha ahte bandwidth capacities tihchak lehzual a nih thu an tarlang bawk.

Pu Biakthianghlima Chenkual, DGm BSNL Mizoram Headquarters chuan lawmthu sawiin thutkhawm hi a tin a ni.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah UD&PA Minister Pu K. Sapdanga hovin Lunglei khawpui hmasawnna tur sawi hovin Lungleia MLA-te, LMC hotute leh UD&PA official-te an ṭhu khawm
content:
1088/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 19:Vawiin khan Mizoram sawrkara Urban Development & Poverty Alleviation (UD&PA) Minister Pu K. Sapdanga hovin Lungleia MLA-te, Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) hotute leh UD&PA official-te chu Lunglei Convention Centre-a LMC Board of Councillors (BoC) Meeting Hall-ah an ṭhu khawm.

He hunah hian Lunglei South bialtu MLA Pu Lalramliana Papuia, Lunglei West bialtu MLA Pu T. Lalhlimpuia, LMC Chairman Pu Lalzuithanga leh councillor-te, UD&PA Commissioner & Secretary Pu K. Lalthawmmawia, Director Pu Jacob Lalawmpuia, LMC Chief Executive Officer (CEO) Pu Lalhmansanga leh UD&PA leh LMC official-te an tel a. UD&PA hnuaia Lunglei khawpui chhung hmasawnna tur hna kal mekte thlir hovin, hmathlir leh hmachhawp hrang hrang an sawi ho.

Minister Pu K. Sapdanga chuan UD&PA hnuaiah Lunglei khawpui hmasawnna tur hna thawh mek leh hmachhawp ṭhahnem tak a awm tih sawiin, khawpui hmasawn nan Lungleia MLA-te leh LMC hotute nen eng kim inhre pawh leh inlung rual tlang taka thawh ho a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Mipui ai awha thlan MLA-te leh councillor-te, LMC leh UD&PA Department te chu tum inang leh rawngbawlsak thuhmun nei an nih angin hma lakna inhriat pawh leh sawi ho ṭhin a ṭul thu sawiin, ṭhut khawm chu hma lakna kal mek leh hmachhawp te, duhthusam leh hmathlir te inhrilh tawnna leh sawi hona atana buatsaih a nih thu a sawi a. UD&PA hnuaia Lungleia hmasawnna hna thawh hrang hrang chu Municipal kuta awm tur leh sum thawk chhuak tur, sum pawh LMC suma lut tura duan a nih thu sawiin, a hlawhtlin hun nghahhlehawm a tih thu a sawi a. Ruahmanna ṭha tak tak awm mah se, hna thawh nan sum a ngaih avangin hmanhmawh theih loh chin a awm tih sawiin, LMC kal tlangin Lunglei khawpui hmasawnna tur hma lakna chak taka a kal chhoh zel a beisei thu a sawi.

LMC Chairman Pu Lalzuithanga chuan inlawmna thu sawiin, UD&PA Minister-in LMC mamawh hrang hrangah ṭhahnem a ngaihpui ṭhin leh a hmuna tlawh a, inkawm hona hun ṭha tak a buatsaih ṭhin chu lawmawm an tih thu a sawi.

Lunglei South bialtu MLA Pu Lalramliana Papuia chuan UD&PA hnuaia Lunglei hmasawnna tur project ṭhahnem tak kalpui mek leh hmachhawp awm chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Mizoram sawrkar, Minister leh department hotute chungah lawm thu a sawi a. Hmasawnna rualkhai tak a awm theih nan ruahmanna siam kawngah inrawn tlan leh inbiak pawhna ṭha neih a pawimawh thu a sawi.

Lunglei West bialtu MLA Pu T. Lalhlimpuia chuan Lunglei tan theih tawpa kawng ṭha buaipui leh siam chhoh zel a nih thu sawiin, kawng ṭha leh tlo nei tur leh khawpui hmasawn nan tuiluankawr ṭha leh felfai zawk neih a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Khawpui ṭhang chho leh insingsa mekah kawng sira thil zuarte felfai zawka enkawl dan tur leh vantlang inthiarna ṭha neih a pawimawh thu te sawiin, vawiina ruahmannain nakin hun thui tak a hril avangin ngaihtuahna sen thiam a ṭul thu a sawi a. Ṭha leh chak zawka hna thawk turin hmasawnna hna thawktute inkara inbiak pawhna ṭha a pawimawh thu a sawi bawk.

UD&PA Commissioner & Secretary Pu K. Lalthawmmawia chuan UD&PA leh LMC thawh hona chungchang leh Lunglei khawpui hmasawnna tura rawtna leh thil pawimawh hrang hrang a sawi a. UD&PA Director Pu Jacob Lalawmpuia chuan UD&PA hnuaia Lunglei khawpui hmasawnna hna kal mek leh hmachhawp hrang hrang a tar lang a. LMC Vice Chairman Pu K. Lalrinawma, Councillor-te leh CEO Pu Lalhmansanga te pawhin Lunglei hmasawnna tura an ngaih pawimawh leh rawtna te, sawrkar hma lakna hrang hrang avanga an lawm thu te an sawi bawk.

UD&PA hnuaia Lungleia hmasawnna hna lian zual kalpui mek leh hmachhawp awm vawiin ṭhut khawma tar lan zingah, State Priority Project (SPP) 2024–2025 hnuaiah cheng nuai 1,750 hu project panga – Sazaikawna LMC Complex, Theiriata Transport Hub, Ramthar AOC-a Market Shed leh C. Ṭhuamluaia Mual bula Multi-Level Car Parking sakna tur leh Saikuti Hall chei ṭhatna tur te a tel a. Urban Infrastructure Development Fund (UIDF 2025–2026) hnuaiah Lunglei Park chei ṭhatna tur leh vantlang inthiarna (pay and use toilet) leh kea kalna (footpath) siamna tur cheng nuai 525 dah niin, SASCI Part-XB hnuaiah khawpui chhung hmasawnna hna hrang hrang 80 thawhna tur cheng nuai 200 dah a ni bawk a. Lunglei Pulse hnuaiah Lunglei khawpui cheina leh hmasawnna ruhrel dinna tur hna hrang hrang 18 atan cheng nuai 1,262 ruahman niin, SASCI 2024–2025 Part-XIII hnuaiah tuichhe paihna leh tuiluankawr Storm Drain & Drainage Network siamna tur cheng nuai 250 leh SASCI 2025–2026 Part-V hnuaiah cheng nuai 1,400 senga Theiriata Common Bio-Medical Waste Treatment Facility dinna tur ruahmanna te a awm bawk.

title: KOLASIBAH LEGAL AID DEFENCE COUNSEL SYSTEM  STAFF TE LEH PUBLIC PROSECUTOR A THAWKTUTE TAN CRIMINAL LAW CHUNGCHANGAH TRAINING NEIH A NI
content:
1087/2026-2027

Kolasib the 19th June, 2026 :Vawiin khan Superintendent of Police, Conference Hall, Kolasibah District Legal Services Authority, District Eexeutive Force leh Excise & Narcotic department Kolasib tangkawpin Kolasib District chhunga Police leh Excise & Narcotics Officers te tan Criminal Law training buatsaih a ni.

He Training hi Pu V. Vanlalhriata, Secretary DLSA, Kolasib chuan a kaihruai a, Pu Lalrinpuia Varte, Sr. SP Kolasib chuan Police leh Excise & Narcotics Officers te tan Criminal Law chungchanga training buatsaih a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Training a tel zawng zawngten an thu zir atanga an hna ah a pui thei ngei a beisei thu a sawi a, taimah taka he hun hi hmang turin  kalkhawmte a fuih bawk.

He hunah hian Pi Cassandra Zosangliani, Judicial Magistrate First Class chuan zirtirna a pe a.  Zawhna leh chhanna hun hman a ni a. Kolasib district huamchhunga Police leh Excise & Narcotics hotute mi thahnemtak an tel a ni.

title: Telecom Advisory Committee (TAC) meeting held
content:
187/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, 19 June 2026:Today, the Telecom Advisory Committee (TAC) held a meeting at CWW Conference Hall New Capital Complex under the chairmanship of Mizoram Lok Sabha MP & TAC Chairman Shri Richard Vanlalhmangaiha. The meeting was attended by TAC members and BSNL officers of Mizoram BA.

The MP Lok Sabha Shri Richard Vanlalhmangaiha informed the BSNL to take action for telecom coverage at all villages especially to enable villagers for geo-tagging under PM Poshan, VB-G RAM G, NREGA, etc. He encouraged the BSNL officers to make all out effort for completion of important projects including DBN 4G Saturation Project, BOP-BIP Project, Indo-Myanmar Project and others.

During the meeting, Shri B.P. Meena, General Manager, BSNL Mizoram BA, presented an overview of the major telecom initiatives undertaken in the State. He highlighted the commissioning of 111 new 4G sites under Phase-IX.2 and 30 sites under the 4G Saturation Project, significantly improving mobile connectivity in remote and previously uncovered villages. BSNL also informed the Committee that Optical Fibre Cable (OFC) connectivity has recently been extended to Saitual, Khawzawl and Champhai district headquarters. Further, bandwidth capacities at Serchhip, Lunglei, Lawngtlai, and Siaha have been substantially enhanced to meet the growing demand for telecom and broadband services.

Shri B.P. Meena further informed the Committee that the Government of India has launched the Amended BharatNet Programme (ABP), a flagship initiative to strengthen digital connectivity in rural areas. Under this programme, all 776 Gram Panchayats (GPs) in Mizoram will be connected through an extensive optical fibre network. Approximately 5,600 km of OFC is proposed to be laid across the State, enabling improved broadband access and digital services in rural and remote areas.

The meeting concluded with a vote of thanks proposed by Shri Biakthianghlima Chenkual, DGM (HQ), BSNL Mizoram.

Attachment

title: DEA, MINISTRY OF FINANCE SEMINAR-AH CHIEF MINISTER TEL
content:
1086/2026-2027

Aizawl the 19th June 2026:Vawiin khan Department of Economic Affairs, Ministry of Finance chuan Shillong-ah “Leveraging Externally Aided Projects (EAPs) in the North Eastern State” tih thupui hmangin Seminar / Workshop a buatsaih a. A hawnna inkhawm Union Finance Minister Pi Nirmala Sitharaman kaihhruiah hian hmarchhak state Chief Minister zawng zawngte leh state tin atanga official pawimawhte an tel a. Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma pawhin thu a sawi.

Seminar hi EAP kalpuina kawnga hmarchhak bialte thuam chakna (capacity building) leh an tawnhriatte inhrilhtawnna (experience sharing) atana buatsaih a ni a. Kum eng emaw zat kaltaa state hrang hranga EAP kalpui tawhte thlirletna neih a nih bakah Externally Aided Project tha zawk, ram tana chhawr nahawm zawk duang chhuak zel tura inrawnkhawmna a ni nghal bawk.

Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan, EAP kaltlang hian ram dang atangin mithiam tak takten kan hmalakna min rawn enpui thin a, kan harsatnate an rawn zir a, an thiamna leh tawnhriatte min hrilh thin a. Hei hi kan hlawkpui hle. Mizoram hi hmarchhak state zinga EAP lian tham dawng hmasa pawl kan ni a, Aizawl – Thenzawl – Lunglei World Bank Road kan nei a. ADB Fund hmangin kawngpui dang pawh kan lai a, ramri lam inkalpawhna tichak turin Mizoram State Roads II Project kan nei a, Urban Infrastructure te, Water Supply tihchangtlunna te, sorkar sum enkawlna tihchangtlunna Public Resource management Programme chenin kan thawk a.

Agriculture lamah IFAD kaltlangin FOCUS kan kalpui a, FOSUS zarah hian chhungkaw 55,000 te chu an sum lakluh 43% zetin a pung a, leilung venhimna lamah hma kan sawnpui bawk a. Hriselna lamah World Bank puihnain Health System Strengthening Project kan kalpui a, sorkar enkawl hriselna hmunhma (centres/hospital) 62 zet chu NQAS Certified an nih phah a. He project kal kalpui hma hian Mizoramin NQAS Certified Centre leh Hospital kan la nei ngai lo a ni. JICA sum hmangin Super Speciality Cancer Centre kan sa mek a, ADB fund rinchhanin Universal Health Care Scheme kan kalpui mek bawk a. Energy lama intodelh tumin New Development Bank fund hmangin 24 MW Tuirini HEP bul kan tan leh tawh bawk.

Externally Aided Projects te hi infrastructure tha leh lian tham tak tak neih nan kan hmang a, project tam zawk hmuh theih kan mamawh hle a, hmarchhak bial tana kan hmuh theih zat tam zawng bithliah (EAP Ceiling) pawh hi min tihsansak ula kan duh a ni, a ti.

Seminar hawnna inkhawmah hian Pi Anuradha Thakur, Secretary, DEA chuan kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi a, Chairman Pi Nirmala Sitharaman chuan Seminar neih chhan (Keynote Address) a sawi a, hmarchhak state Chief Minister zawng zawngte bakah Pu Johannes Zutt, Vice President, South Asia Region, World Bank Group pawhin thu a sawi a ni.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER ADDRESSES DEA, MINISTRY OF FINANCE SEMINAR IN SHILLONG
content:
186/2026-2027

Aizawl, 19 June 2026:Chief Minister Shri Lalduhoma today addressed a Seminar/Workshop on “Leveraging Externally Aided Projects (EAPs) in the North Eastern States” organised by the Department of Economic Affairs (DEA), Ministry of Finance, at Shillong.

The inaugural session of the seminar was chaired by Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman and was attended by Chief Ministers from all North Eastern States, along with senior officials from the region and the Government of India.

The seminar was organised to strengthen the capacity of North Eastern States in implementing Externally Aided Projects (EAPs) and to facilitate the sharing of experiences and best practices. It also reviewed EAPs implemented across different states over the years and explored ways to design more effective and impactful projects for the benefit of the region.

In his address, Chief Minister Shri Lalduhoma highlighted the significant role played by EAPs in Mizoram’s development. He stated that externally aided projects not only provide financial assistance but also bring valuable technical expertise, as specialists from partner institutions study local challenges and share their knowledge and experiences to improve project implementation.

The Chief Minister noted that Mizoram is among the leading states in the North East in terms of accessing EAP funding. He cited several major initiatives supported by international development partners, including the Aizawl–Thenzawl–Lunglei Road funded by the World Bank and various road development projects supported by the Asian Development Bank (ADB), including the Mizoram State Roads II Project aimed at strengthening connectivity in border areas.

He further highlighted EAP-supported interventions in urban infrastructure, water supply improvement, and public resource management. In the agriculture sector, the International Fund for Agricultural Development (IFAD)-supported FOCUS project has significantly improved rural livelihoods, benefiting around 55,000 households and increasing their income by approximately 43 percent, while also contributing to environmental conservation.

In the health sector, he said that the World Bank-assisted Health System Strengthening Project has enabled 62 government health facilities and hospitals in Mizoram to obtain National Quality Assurance Standards (NQAS) certification. Prior to the implementation of the project, the state had no NQAS-certified health facility or hospital.

The Chief Minister also highlighted the ongoing construction of the Super Speciality Cancer Centre with assistance from the Japan International Cooperation Agency (JICA), the implementation of the Universal Health Care Scheme supported by ADB funding, and the revival of the 24 MW Tuirini Hydroelectric Project with support from the New Development Bank (NDB) as part of the state’s efforts towards energy self-sufficiency.

Stressing the importance of EAPs in creating quality infrastructure and accelerating development, Shri Lalduhoma stated that Mizoram requires access to more such projects. He also appealed for an enhancement of the EAP ceiling available to the North Eastern States to enable them to undertake a greater number of development initiatives.

During the inaugural session, Secretary, DEA, Anuradha Thakur delivered the welcome address, while Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman delivered the keynote address. The session was also addressed by Johannes Zutt, Vice President, South Asia Region, World Bank Group, along with the Chief Ministers of the North Eastern States.

Attachment

title: UD&PA Minister Pu K. Sapdanga'n Lungleia UD&PA hnuaia hma lakna hrang hrang a tlawh
content:
1085/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 19:Vawiin khan Mizoram sawrkara Urban Development & Poverty Alleviation (UD&PA) Minister Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Lunglei khawpui chhunga UD&PA hnuaia hma lakna hrang hrangte tlawhin, a dinhmun leh hma lak chhunzawm dan tur a hmunah a enfiah.

UD&PA Minister Pu K. Sapdanga hi Lunglei South bialtu MLA Pu Lalramliana Papuia, Lunglei West bialtu MLA Pu T. Lalhlimpuia, Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) Chairman Pu Lalzuithanga leh councillor-te, UD&PA Commissioner & Secretary Pu K. Lalthawmmawia, Director Pu Jacob Lalawmpuia, LMC Chief Executive Officer Pu Lalhmansanga leh official dangte'n an ṭawiawm a. Tuialhthei renchemna atan hma lakna tlawh kualnaah hian lirthei hrang hranga inzui lovin, Mizoram State Transport (MST) bus hmangin a huhovin an kal a ni.

UD&PA Minister hian Chanmari-a vantlang len khawthawnna Lunglei Park chei ṭhat hna thawh tur leh hman nawn theih bungraw dah khawmna leh lak chhuahna hmunpui 3R (Reduce, Reuse, Recycle) Centre te, Circuit House penga hahchawlhna Pocket Park siamna tura ruahman te, C. Ṭhuamluaia Mual bula lirthei dahna Multi-Level Car Parking sak mek te, Pukpuia Lunglei khawpui bawlhhlawh sawngbawlna tur Solid Waste Management Centre-II sak mek te, Saikuti Hall chei ṭhat tur leh Lunglei Pulse hnuaia khawpui chei mawina tur leh hmasawnna ruhrel dinna tur te a hmunah a tlawh kual a. Hna kal mek a endik bakah, MLA, LMC hotute leh UD&PA hotute nen chak zawk leh ṭha zawka hna thawh a nih theih nana hmachhawp leh ruahmanna te, Lunglei khawpui hmasawnna atana mamawh hrang hrangte an sawi ho nghal.

Solid Waste Management Centre-II, Pukpui hi Swachh Bharat Mission (Urban) 2.0 leh ringfenced fund aṭanga thawh niin, cheng nuai 698.01 senna tur a ni a. A hna civil work hi LHM Infra, Khatla, Aizawl te'n thawkin, October ni 6, 2024 khan hna an ṭan a, October 2026-ah zawh theih beisei a ni. A panna kawng (approach road) laih zawh tawh niin, PCC pavement-a siam mek a ni a. A hranga bawlhhlawh ṭawih thei sawngbawlna tur leh ṭawih thei lo sawngbawlna tur (wet & dry waste) building leh site office building sak hna thawh mek niin, tun dinhmunah hna 70% vel thawh zawh tawh a ni a. Civil work bakah hian bawlhhlawh sawngbawlna atana khawl leh hmanraw mamawh te pawh ngaihtuah mek a ni bawk a. Minister chuan Lunglei khawpui chuan bawlhhlawh sawngbawlna hmun ṭha tak pahnih a nei thuai dawn tih sawiin, ṭangkai leh hlawhtling taka hman a nih theih nan tun aṭangin mipuite'n in chhung khura bawlhhlawh thliar hran lo zir lawk a pawimawh thu a sawi.

Lungleia 3R Centre hmasa ber, Chanmari-a mi hi Mizoram Bana Kaih (Handholding) Scheme hnuaia Mizoram District Transformation Programme (MDTP), Swachh Bharat Mission-Urban 2.0 leh DAY-NULM hma laknaa June ni 5, 2026-a hawn, UD&PA enkawl a ni a. Lunglei Sub-Headquarters MHIP te nen ṭang tlangin Lunglei khawpui chhunga MHIP branch hrang hrangte'n bungrua, thawmhnaw leh lehkhabu hlui an khawn khawmte chu a mamawh apiangte'n an lak theih turin 3R Centre-ah hian dah niin, Self Help Group te'n thil chhia aṭanga thil ṭangkai zawk an siamte an pho chhuak bawk a. Bungrua hi lirthei laihawl phur 10 chuang dawn tawh niin, hawn a nih aṭangin pisa kai niah mamawh laa dawrtu ni tin chawh rualin mi 150 vel zel an awm anga chhinchhiah a ni. Minister chuan 3R Centre chu hnawk leh bawlhhlawh chang mai turte a mamawh zawk mi tam takin an lo hman ṭangkai tura dah khawmna a nih angin bawlhhlawh titlemtu, hman nawn theih hman nawn leh thil ṭangkai zawka siamna, faina leh thianghlimna leh inrenchemna atana hma lakna pawimawh tak a nih thu a sawi a. Lungleia 3R Centre kalpui dan chu ṭha a tih thu leh chhawm nun zel ni se a duh thu sawiin, Centre hlawhtlinna atana UD&PA-a thawktute, MHIP, SHG leh bungraw thawhtute inpekna leh thawh rimnaah lawm thu a sawi a. An bungrua, thawmhnaw leh lehkhabu hluite mi dang tan 3R Centre-ah hian thawh a, a mamawhtute pawhin inthlahrung lova an mamawh lak nan hmang ṭangkai zel turin mipuite a chah.

C. Ṭhuamluaia Mual bula Multi-Level Car Parking tur hi State Priority Project (SPP) hnuaiah cheng nuai 300 senga sak mek niin, a sak hna hi Brilliant Consultancy, Chaltlang, Aizawl te'n an thawk a. March ni 24, 2026 khan hna ṭanin, February ni 28, 2028-a zawh tur a ni a. Lirthei dahna tur hi chhawng thum ruahman niin, 1st Floor-ah 2 Wheeler 40, 2nd Floor-ah 4 Wheeler 18 leh 3rd Floor-ah 4 Wheeler 20 dah theih tura ruahman a ni a. Tunah hian a hmun laih hna thawh mek niin, hna pum pui aṭangin zaa sawmhnih (20%) vel thawh tawh a ni a. Minister chuan C. Ṭhuamluaia Mual leh a chehvela hun hmangtute tan lirthei dahna leh chet vel tiziaawm tur hma lakna chu ṭha tak leh a hun taka zawh tum turin hna thawktute a chah.

Lunglei Park chei ṭhat hna hi Urban Infrastructure Development Fund (UIDF) hnuaiah cheng nuai 200 senga thawh tur niin, hna thawk tur hian A3 Design Build, Zonuam, Aizawl te thlan an ni a. Hna hi June 2026 chhunga ṭan hman beisei niin, thla 18 chhunga zawh tur a ni a. Minister chuan contractor-te chu hna ṭan thuai tum tur leh a ṭha thei ang ber leh chak thei ang bera thawh zawh tum turin a chah.

Minister hian Circuit House penga Pocket Park siamna tur ruahmanna te, SPP hnuaia cheng nuai 500 senga Saikuti Hall chei ṭhat tur ruahmanna leh Lunglei Pulse hnuaia cheng nuai 1,262 senga khawpui chei mawina tur leh hmasawnna ruhrel hrang hrang dinna tur ruahmanna te pawh chak taka bawhzui zel a nih a beisei thu sawiin, Lunglei khawpui hmel lanna leh mipui tana ṭangkai tur a nih angin mawhphurtute chu theih tawp chhuah tur leh ṭha tak leh hlawhtling taka kalpui a nih theih nana hma la turin a chah.

title: ASSEMBLY SPEAKER IN LAWMPUINA HUN A HMANPUI
content:
1084/2026-2027

Aizawl the 19th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram Legislative Assembly Speaker Pu Lalbiakzama chuan IIT Roorkee atanga M. Tech (Structure Engineering) a pakhatna Er. Lalawmpuia lawmpui nan a pisaah thingpui a inpui.

Er. Lalawmpuia MES hi Sihfa khawchhuak niin Ramhlun Vengthar, Aizawl-a khawsa mek a. Tunah hian PHE Department hnuaiah Kawrthah Division SDO a ni a. Kumin 2026 a Roorkee atanga M. Tech (Structure Engineering) result chhuakah pakhatna a ni.

Pu Lalbiakzama hian a  Office Chamber-ah Lawmpuina Thuziak hlanin Er Lalawmpuia leh a chhungte nen thingpui an inho a ni.

title: Saitualah fur lo thleng meka khuarel chhiatna laka kawnga kal mipuite himna tur ngaihtuahin thu khawm
content:
1082/2026-2027

Saitual, the 19th June, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Room, Saitualah fur lo thleng meka khuarel chhiatna laka kawnga kal mipuite an him zawk nan District Road Safety Committee leh District Highway Safety Task Force chu an chairperson, District Bawrhsap ni bawk Pu Srinivas Sadi kaihhruaiin an thu khawm.

He hunah hian District Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi chuan furpui a lo thlenin kawnga chetsualna (accident) chu a thleng nasa thin hle a ni, a ti a, mipuite an him zawkna ngaihtuaha theih tawp chhuah a tul a ni, a ti.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian kalkhawmte chuan kalkawnga leimin a awm changa rang taka inbiakpawhna tur Whatsapp group siam ni se tih rel a ni a, chutah chuan NHIDCL te, officials te bakah YMA te pawh tel tura rel a ni. SP Office lamin accident thlen dan data zawng zawng te an lo la khawm ang a, Accident thleng te hi MyBharat portalah 29th June, 2026 chhunga upload tura rua hman a ni bawk.

Hei bakah hian District Road Safety Committee leh khawtlang hruaitute tangkhawmin accident thlen tamna hmun te zawn chhuah a, chhinchhiah tura rel a ni. NH-06 leh NH-102 B ina a pal tlang kawnga tui luan kawr (drainage) inhnawh zawng zawng te chu June ni 30 hmain tihfai (clear) vek tura tih a ni bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawm hi District Road Safety Committee leh District Highway Safety Task Force chairperson, Pu Srinivas Sadi in a kai hruai a, member te an tel a ni.

title: Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Aizawl West-II huamchhunga sawrkar Primary School-ah pheikhawk sem chhunzawm
content:
1083/2026-2027

Aizawl the 19th June, 2026:Aizawl West II bialtu MLA Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Minister of State, Sports & Youth Services, etc. ni bawk chuan vawiin khan a bial chhunga sorkar primary school-ah te zirlaite tan school uniform pheikhawk a sem chhunzawm a. Vawiinah hian Govt. Primary School, Kanan; Chhinlung Academy, Vaivakawn; Govt. Primary School, Dawrpui Vengthar; Govt. Tuikual Primary School I, Tuikual North leh Govt. Tuikual Primary School III, Tuikual South-ah te sem a ni.

Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Mizorama zirtirtu tha berte awmna chu sorkar school a ni a, trained teacher vek an awm a, zirna tha kan nei a ni, a ti. Sorkar school-a luh nachang kan hriat zel a pawimawh a, bial chhung sawrkar school thenkhatah chuan hmunhma in a dawl zawh dawn loh thlenga zirlai lut tur nei an awm a. Hetihlai hian zirtirtute pawhin theihtawp kan chhuah reng a ngai a, miin kan school a rawn luh hi an tum reng angem tih hi kan inzawh fo a ngai, a ti. School hi nungchang kan zir tanna a ni a, thiamna bakah nunkawng inzirtirna tha kan dawng a, sorkar school-te hi a zirna leh thildangte tihhmasawn a tihchangtlun zel kan tum dawn a ni, tiin Minister chuan a sawi bawk.

Aizawl West-II huamchhunga sawrkar primary school zirlaite hnena uniform pheikhawk sem hi June ni 17, 2026 (Nilaini) atang khan neih tan a ni a. Bial chhung school pariatah pheikhawk bun 683 sem tur niin, karlehah school pakhatah sem leh a ni ang.

Bialtu MLA in school uniform pheikhawk a semnaah hian school awmna veng hrang hranga Local Council te leh zirlai nu leh pate pawhin an telpui a ni.

Dated Khawzawl, the 19th June, 2026 :Vawiin khan KVK Khawzawl chuan Chawngtlai khuaa Tomato chingtute chu an huan ngeiah kal chilhin Khet Bachao Abhiyan Awareness Campaign (Save the Field) hun an hmanpui.Dr. Malsawmkimi, Senior Scietist & Head KVK Khawzawl chuan he hun hi kaihruaiin, he campaign-in a tum ber chu leilung humhalh, fertilizer leh pesticide-te a hman dan dik kuthnathawktute hnena hriattir a nih thu a sawi a. Leitha hman dan dik, dawmdawi leh hlo tur awmze nei zawka huan thlai enkawl dan zirtirna a pe nghal bawk a ni.Tin he hunah hian Tomato chingtuten harsatna hrang hrang an tawhte an sawi a, an harsatna tawhte chin fel dan tur hrilh an ni bawk.

title: Minister Pi Lalrinpuii hovin DHS leh NHM District office-te hnathawh dan thlirhona neih a ni
content:
1080/2026-2027

Aizawl, 19 june 2026:Health & Family Welfare Department Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan vawiin khan SAD Conference Hall No.1, MINECO, Aizawl-ah Directorate of Health Services (DHS) leh National Health Mission (NHM) hnuaia District Office hrang hrangte hnathawh dan thlirhona a neihpui. Meeting-ah hian District Chief Medical Officer (CMO), Sr.CMO zawng zawngte leh department official pawimawhte an tel a, district-te hmalakna, hlawhtlinna leh harsatna te an sawiho a ni.

Health Minister chuan thusawiin, Mizoram chhunga health indicator hrang hrangte hmasawnna chu District hrang hranga Senior CMO, CMO, Doctor, Nurse leh Health Worker-te thawhrimna leh inpekna vang a nih thu a sawi a. District tinah monitoring leh supervision tih chak a, district level review meeting regular taka nei thin tur leh programme data uluk taka thlir chunga hma la zel turin a chah. Deputy Commissioner-te nen thawhhona ṭha neih a pawimawh thu sawiin, district administration-ah regular staff leh NHM contractual staff-te inkara thawhhona tha siam tur leh field-a thawktute harsatna ngaihsak turin a fuih bawk a ni.

Minister chuan Maternal Death leh Infant Death thlengte chu uluk taka bawhzui a, programme hrang hrang hmalaknaah, nu leh nausen thi chungchangah uluk taka chhui a, thihna titlem lehzual tura hmalak chhunzawm zel tur a ni, a ti a. TB programme chu elimination phase-a a luh tawh avangin screening leh treatment-ah tan lak thar leh a ngai a, NQAS certification hna thawk zel tur leh thawktute fuih thar zel turin a chah bawk.

Meeting ah hian minister chuan CSR kaltlanga mamawh hrang hrang ngaihtuah leh online review meeting neih tam a pawimawh thu a sawi a; Cess sum hmangin hard area-a thawk Medical Officer-te tan motor lei tum a nih thu a tarlang. Achievement tam takte hi thingtlang lama kan field worker-te thawhrah anih avangin, District Office-a thawktute chu field worker-te harsatna thlen ngamna nih an tum tur a ni, a ti.

Meeting-ah hian hmasawnna chhuanawm tak tak te tarlan a ni a, chungte chu:

1) Nu leh nau hriselna:District tam zawkah damdawiina nau neih (institutional delivery) 95% chunglam a ni a. Hnahthial district-ah kum khat chhungin maternal death an nei lo a , Khawzawl district-in FY 2025–26 chhungin nu thi, nausen leh piang hlim thi an nei lo bawk.

2) Immunisation leh HPV:District tam takin 95–100% full immunisation an nei a, Khawzawl chuan Mizoramah a hmasa ber ni-in HPV vaccination 100% a ti tawh a ni.

3) NQAS Certification:Health facility tam takin National leh State NQAS certification an dawng a, Aizawl East-in an District Hospital, PHC leh UPHC-ah 100% certification an nei.

4) TB leh Malaria dona:Lunglei-in TB-free village 30 a puan bakah, Malaria case 50% in a ti tlahniam a, Malaria-free village 42 a nei bawk.

5) Infrastructure:Khawzawl district-in thla thum chhungin administrative health system an din fel a, Health & Wellness Centre zawng zawng solar an vuah bawk. Lunglei-in damlo phurhna Bolero Camper pahnih a dawng a ni.

Programme hi Pi Lalnunmawii Additional Secretary,Health & Family Welfare Department-in a kaihruai a, District tin Sr.CMO leh CMO te chuan presentation neiin an hnathawh tawh leh an hmachhawp te, an harsatnate thlenin hun an hmang a ni.

title: Mamit Bialtu MLA in MSU Mamit huaihawt Zirlai titha chawimawina hun hmanpui
content:
1079/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 19th of June, 2026 :Vawiin khan Chhimveng YMA Hall-ah Mizo Student Union (MSU), Mamit huaihawtin Mamit khawpui chhunga zirlai tithate chawimawina neih a ni a. Er H. Lalzirliana, Bialtu MLA chuan Khual Lian ni a hmanpuiin, Pu Suvigya S. Chandra, District Bawrhsap chu Khual zahawm a ni.

Khual lian chuan Mamit-in zirna lama hmasawnna kan hmu chho ta leh Mizoram deng chhuak khawpa thiamna nei kan awm ta chu khaw pa a nihna ang pawha a lawmthu a sawia, hniam bik riau leh tlawng thlang rilru pu tih kan nih thinna pawh thiamna hmangin kan hneh zel a ni tiin, Mamit khawtualah ngei Science leh Commerce zirna kan nei ve ta te, kumin HSSLC result chhuaka Commerce bika 100% result kan nei ta te chu hmasawnna lawmawm tak a ni a, Covid -19 laia Health Worker Involunteer tur kan District-ah kan in hmuh loh laiin tunah chuan ANM zirna School Mamit-ah ngei kan nei tak avangin kumtin mi 20 zirchhhuak kan nei ta te hi  hmasawnna ropui tak a ni a ti. Heng hmasawnna ban phak ve tura zirlaite kan in buatsaih a tul a, hlawhtlinna changtate a lawmpui thu a sawi.

Pu Zira chuan India ramin hmasawnna kawnga zawh chho meka, khawvel ram changkang tehna G-7 hialah India ram hi kan tel tawh a, kan GDP pawh 7.8 hial a kai a ni. Ramin hmasawnna kawng a zawh zel avangin hna a pung zel dawn a, mithiam bik leh mi ti tak tak te tan hna a in hawng zel dawn a, chuvang chuan kan zirlaiah phurna nasa zawk nena thahnemngai lehzuala tan la turin a chah a ni.

Khual zahawm Pu Suvigya S. Chandra pawhin zirlaite fuihna thu sawiin, theihtawpchhuaha zirlai zir te'n hlawhtlinna an chan thin avangin taima taka an zirlaite zirturin a chah.

Vawiina zirlai titha chawimawite hi MES, MBBS, School 100% passed, HSLC top ten in hlangkai mi 2, HSLC Disctintion - 5, 1st Division - 31, HSSLC -ah Disntintion - 2 bakah 1st Division - 20 te hnenah chawimawina hi hlan an ni.

Zirlai titha chawimawina hunah hian Pu B. Lalkhawngaihzuala, President Generel Hqrs, MSU chuan thusawina a nei a, Pu Lalremmuana Punte, President MSU, District Headquarters, Mamit chuan inlawmna thu a sawi bawk.

Chawhnu hunah Mamit Officer Club huaihawtin zirlai kalkhawmte tan Career Guidance neih a ni a, Pu RK Hnuna, Director, Zo Carrier Solution chu Resource Person niin MOC atangin Discussion leh Counselling hun hman a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: India rama Sawrkar damdawi in ṭha tehnaah CHC 1 leh Sub-Centre 2 tling thar
content:
1078/2026-2027

19th June, 2026:India rama sawrkar damdawi in ṭha bik tehna, National Quality Assurance Standards (NQAS)-ah Lengpui CHC leh Health & Wellness Centre (Sub-Centre) pahnih – Upper Republic HWC-SC leh Electric Veng HWC-SC te an tling thar a, heti hian Mizoram chhunga Cummunity Health Centre (CHC) pakua awm zinga pathumin National-level NQAS certificate nei tawhin HWC-Sub Centres pathum (3)-in National Certification puitling an nei tawh bawk.

Dr. R Lalchhuanawma, Mission Director, National Health Mission, Health & Family Welfare Department chuan NQAS national-level endiknaa tling thar Lengpui CHC hian a tehnaah 97.59% an hmu a, Upper Republic HWC-SC hian 81.08% hmuin, Electric Veng HWC-SC hian 84.10% an hmu bawk a ni.

Heti hian Mizoram chhunga Sawrkar damdawi in 119 te’n NQAS national-level certificate an nei mek a. Tunah hian sawrkar damdawi in 47-in (HWC Sub-Centre 40 telin) state-level NQAS certificate an nei tawh a, national-level-a endikna tur an dil mek a ni.

NQAS certified damdawi in te hi endikna chhawng thum paltlang an ni a, a tawp bera endikna an hmachhawn hi National External Assessment a ni a, state pawn aṭangin Assessor (endiktu) an lo kal ṭhin a ni. Hetah hian a tehnaa 70% an hmuh tlin chuan certified an ni chauh ṭhin. Heng certified tawh damdawi inah te hian natna darh thei ven kawngah te, thawktu zawng zawngte’n an hna bil an thiamna te, an level zelah enkawlna an pek ṭhat dan te, a thlawna enkawlna leh damdawi pek te, damdawi in faina leh dik taka damdawi in bawlhhlawh sawngbawl te, hawihawmna leh a chhehvel vawnfai kawngah te, environment vawn ṭhat kawngah te, khawtlang nena an thawhhonaah te endik an ni.

Mission Director, Dr. R Lalchhuanawma chuan India rama damdawi in ṭha tehna a tling thei tura thawktu State Quality Assurance Unit te, District Quality Assurance Unit, Aizawl East leh Aizawl West-a Sr.CMO leh Staff zawng zawng te, Dr. Judy Saipari Sailo, Medical Officer, Lengpui CHC leh a thawhpui Nurse leh staff zawng zawng te, Pi C Lalrinzuali, Health & Wellness Officer, Upper Republic HWC-SC te, Pi C Lalnunmawii, Health & Wellness Officer, Electric Veng HWC-SC te leh an thawhpui Health Worker leh staff zawng zawng te, khawtlanga an thawhpui RKS leh JAS Chairman leh member zawng zawng te chu fakawm a tiin lawmthu a sawi a.  Heng NQAS certified sawrkar damdawi in kan neih tak te hi mipuite’n ṭangkai taka an hman a duhsak a, mipuite pawhin ṭangkai taka hmang turin a chah bawk.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWLAH DISTRICT LEVEL GOVERNMENT LAND AUTHORITY THUKHAWM
content:
1076/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 19th June, 2026 : Vawiin khan District Level Government Land Authority chu Addl DC Pu K. Zorammuana kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall-ah an thukhawm.

He thutkhawmah hian Govt Khawzawl High School ram hmawr chu Fire and Emergency Station leh quarter sak nan rem tih a ni a. Excise and Narcotics Department ram dil chu an ram mamawh zau zawngte an thehluh hnuah a hmun tur enho leh ni se tia rel a ni.

DLGLA Committee-ah hian member thahnem tak a ni.

Attachment

title: RD&A Minister Prof.Lalnilawma hovin thingtlang tihhmasawnna tur ngaihtuah
content:
1075/2026-2027

19th June, 2026:Rural Development and Administration Department changtu Minister Prof.Lalnilawma hovin vawiin khan a pisaah 16th Finance Commission sum hmang a Village Council ten thingtlang tihhmasawnna tur (16th Finance Commission Grand to Rural Local Bodies in Mizoram) kalpui dan tur chungchangah ruahmanna an siam a, inrawnkhawmna hun an hmang.

Minister chuan 15th Finance Commission sum luangral (lapse) lova kan hai chhuak thei vek hi a lawmawm a, hei hi Pathian malsawmna leh thawhhona tha vang a ni, a ti. 15th Finance Commission sum hai chhuak tura theih tawp chhuahtu kan Sawrkar official te hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. 16th Finance Commission sum pawh a hun taka hai chhuak thei turin tun atangin inbuatsaih that a pawimawh a, chumi atan chuan thawh hona tha, thahnemngaihna leh inpekna a pawimawh a ni, Prof Lalnilawma chuan a ti. Thawh hona tha kan neih chuan engmah hi huphurhawm a awm lo tih sawiin nasa zawka inpekna thar nei turin thawktute a chah a. Anmahni mawhphurhna leh buaipui lam apiangah theihtawp an chhuah ang a, harsatna an tawk a nih pawhin inhrilh hre zung zung tura fuihin, a sut kian dan an zawn zel tur thu a sawi a ni.

He meeting-ah hian Rural Development & Administration Department, Finance Department, LAD Directorate, PHE Dept, Directorate of Local Fund Audit& Pension, Social Audit Unit Official te leh All Mizoram Village Council Association hruaitute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWLAH DISTRICT ROAD SAFETY COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
1074/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 19th June, 2026 :Nimin khan Khawzawl District Road Safety Committee chu Addl DC Pu K. Zorammuana kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall-ah an thukhawm.He thutkhawmah hian agenda hrang hrang nagihtuahho a ni a. Khawzawl district chhungah kawng lakah accident a awmin e-DAR portal-ah upload nghal zel a nih thu tarlan a ni a. Road accident chungchang stakeholder-te karah awlsam zawk leh a hun taka inhriattir theihna tur ruahman ni se tih a ni bawk.Committee chuan district chhung hmun hrang hranga vantlang kawngpui nekchep chungchang pawh an sawiho a. Member-te chuan hetianga kawng nekchepna hian lirthei leh veivakte chet velna a tihbuai a, thuneitute chu endik turin leh kawng nekcheptute chungah dan angin hma lak ni se tia rel a ni.

Attachment

title: PAYMENT OF DEARNESS ALLOWANCE TO THE STATE GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES AT REVISED RATES EFFECTIVE FROM 01.01.2026
